brief: Busca de informacao e brainstorm sobre atlas digital georreferenciado da Amazonia assistido por IA: problema: acesso controlado e curado a informacao

advisory_decisions.decision: Implementar sensitivity_level nos metadados ChromaDB antes de ingerir qualquer dado do PNCSA ou FUNAI
Adotar CARE + OCAP como restricoes de design: proveniencia, consentimento e direito de remocao por chunk
Adicionar DuckDB spatial como segunda engine de recuperacao para queries geoespaciais reais (ST_Intersects, ST_Area)
Expor query_spatial como tool MCP adicional orquestrado junto com query_knowledge pelo mesmo agente
Implementar render_map tool MCP para saida visual (PNG base64 ou link kepler.gl)
Construir pipeline de ingestao GeoJSON a partir de APIs REST do TerraBrasilis/INPE sem dependencia de pacote R
Substituir all-MiniLM-L6-v2 por paraphrase-multilingual-mpnet-base-v2 para suporte a pt-BR

brief: research on use cases for a system as a virtual space for citizens and public agents to discuss problems and solution ideas

advisory_decisions.decision: Complete UC1 with voice-seeking + problem-solving motivation: citizen input becomes actionable evidence
Split UC2 into UC2a Public Manager and UC2b Investor
Define consent and anonymization layer before implementation
Implement tiered trust scoring and rate-limiting to mitigate coordinated inauthentic behavior
Decompose UC3 into Collection, Synthesis, Profile Consolidation sub-use-cases
Adopt Talk to the City pipeline buildable on existing kb-qa stack
Three-tier access: citizens contribute; managers/investors read synthesis; GaveaLab reads full corpus
